settings.editor: Your smile comes first at SolSmile Lounge, where we deliver high-quality dental care in a calm, judgment-free environment.
Healthy Mouth Cleaning, x-rays & exam. PLUS free custom whitening trays after cleaning and needed treatment.

settings.title: $99 limited exam, x-ray and consultation that includes a 3D full mouth scan.

settings.editor: We offer same-day and after-hour care when possible.

settings.title: Personalized Care. Thoughtful Dentistry. Beautiful Smiles.

settings.editor:
At SolSmile Lounge, your smile is our top priority. Our dental team is committed to providing you with the highest quality dental care in a judgment-free and relaxing environment. Each day, Dr. Megha Patel lives out her passion for quality oral health care, ensuring that our practice is dedicated to patient-focused treatments that value your priorities.

Whether you're seeking preventative, restorative, or cosmetic dentistry, we have the experience and state-of-the-art technology to meet your dental needs. Added sedation dentistry and expanded services ensure your visit to SolSmile Lounge is a truly exceptional experience.

Spanish Speaking Staff Readily Available
Personal que habla español disponible

settings.description_text: Comprehensive exams, cleanings, and preventive care designed to protect your oral health and catch issues early.
From fillings to crowns, we restore damaged or missing teeth to improve function, comfort, and long-term oral health.
Custom-fit, natural-looking dentures that restore your smile, speech, and ability to eat comfortably.
Personalized cosmetic treatments that enhance the look of your smile while maintaining a natural, confident appearance.
A clear, comfortable alternative to braces that gradually straightens your teeth without disrupting your lifestyle.
Fast, compassionate care for dental emergencies, helping relieve pain and address urgent issues when you need it most.

settings.title: Dr. Megha Patel – Welcome to SolSmile Lounge

settings.editor:
Dr. Megha Patel provides judgment-free dental care to even the most anxious of patients. She is a member of the American Dental Association and certified in sedation dentistry, offering a calm environment for our patients to regain the healthy smile they deserve.

Dr. Patel's passion for dentistry stems from her fascination with the hands-on artistic aspect of her profession. Dentistry involves performing intricate procedures, making it appealing to her as she enjoys working with his hands and applying technical skills.

Her commitment to continuous learning and staying up to date with the latest advancements in dental technology ensures that you receive the best possible care during your visits to SolSmile Lounge.

settings.quote_text: "A smile is a curve that sets everything straight. Keep your teeth healthy, and your smile"

settings.editor:
At SolSmile Lounge, we prioritize your comfort and convenience. Our modern and inviting office is equipped with state-of-the-art dental technology to ensure that you receive the highest quality care in the most efficient manner. Our amenities include:

Enhanced Comfort: Relax and enjoy a complimentary beverage, or cozy up with a blanket and watch your favorite show during your appointment. We offer everything from soothing music to sedation to help put your mind at ease.

Advanced Treatments: Our facility is equipped with the latest digital equipment to ensure precision, comfort, and efficiency during your procedures. We use digital X-rays, for a safer and more efficient diagnostic process.

Patient Education: We believe in empowering our patients with knowledge. Dr. Patel and our team take the time to educate you about your oral health and treatment options, enabling you to make informed decisions.

settings.title: Your Dental Care is as Individual as You Are

settings.editor: Your dental care experience is fully personalized at SolSmile Lounge. Our friendly, knowledgeable team will address every question and concern. Your oral health needs, goals, and priorities are the focus of your customized treatment plan. We want to work with you to create the beautiful, healthy smile of your dreams.
